_comment: Hand-compiled from public mirrors of the MOF pre-approved eInvoicing Service Providers list (July 2026, list size ~42). This is best-effort bootstrap data only — the weekly scrape reconciles names, adds missing providers and updates details from the official source. Websites are best-effort and may be corrected by the scrape or by an admin.

providers.name: Defmacro Software DMCC
providers.description: ClearTax's UAE entity, offering e-invoicing compliance, VAT and tax technology for businesses of all sizes.

providers.name: BDO Digital Solutions FZ-LLC
providers.description: Digital arm of BDO in the UAE, combining advisory expertise with e-invoicing compliance technology.

providers.name: Comarch Middle East FZ LLC
providers.description: Regional entity of Comarch, a global EDI and e-invoicing vendor with Peppol network experience across Europe and the Middle East.

providers.name: Covoro AI FZCO
providers.description: UAE-based provider focused on AI-driven invoicing and compliance automation.

providers.name: Cygnet Digital IT Solutions L.L.C
providers.description: Part of Cygnet.One, providing tax technology, e-invoicing and compliance automation across the GCC and India.

providers.name: Deloitte & Touche (M.E.)
providers.description: Deloitte Middle East, delivering e-invoicing compliance solutions backed by Big Four tax advisory capabilities.

providers.name: EDICOM Middle East Services
providers.description: Middle East entity of EDICOM, a global e-invoicing and EDI platform operating certified solutions in dozens of countries.

providers.name: Flick Network L.L.C
providers.description: E-invoicing platform with strong GCC focus, known for ZATCA (Saudi Arabia) compliance and Peppol-based invoicing.

providers.name: Marmin AI Software Design LLC
providers.description: GCC e-invoicing specialist offering compliance automation for UAE and Saudi mandates.

providers.name: Oxinus Holding Limited
providers.description: Technology group providing invoicing and business software solutions in the UAE.

providers.name: Pagero Gulf FZ-LLC
providers.description: Gulf entity of Pagero (a Thomson Reuters company), one of the world's largest Peppol access point operators.

providers.name: Skill Quotient Technologies
providers.description: UAE-based technology firm providing data and compliance platforms, including e-invoicing services.

providers.name: SunTec (Xelerate) Business Solutions DMCC
providers.description: Enterprise revenue-management and billing vendor SunTec, offering e-invoicing compliance through its Xelerate platform.

providers.name: Taxilla Finops 360 FZCO
providers.description: Regtech platform for e-invoicing, tax compliance and financial operations automation.

providers.name: Taxlabs.ai
providers.description: AI-first tax compliance and e-invoicing platform built for the GCC market.

providers.name: TronStride FZC
providers.description: UAE free-zone technology company providing e-invoicing services.

providers.name: Complyance Electronics L.L.C
providers.description: GCC-focused e-invoicing platform helping enterprises comply with UAE and Saudi mandates.

providers.name: Microvista Technologies LLC
providers.description: Software company delivering ERP integrations and e-invoicing compliance tooling.

providers.name: Orchida Soft Computer Systems LLC
providers.description: UAE software house providing business management and invoicing systems.

providers.name: SAP Middle East & North Africa LLC
providers.description: Regional entity of SAP, providing e-invoicing compliance through SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

providers.name: Tally Software Solutions FZCO
providers.description: UAE entity of Tally Solutions, the widely used SME accounting software vendor, approved for UAE e-invoicing.

providers.name: Zoho Corporation FZ LLC
providers.description: UAE entity of Zoho, offering e-invoicing through Zoho Books and the Zoho finance suite.

providers.name: Sovos Compliance FZCO
providers.description: Global tax compliance vendor Sovos, covering validation, Peppol exchange, reporting and archiving for the UAE.

providers.name: Avalara Middle East
providers.description: Global tax automation vendor Avalara, providing e-invoicing and live reporting for multi-country compliance.

providers.name: Casim L.L.C-FZ
providers.description: UAE free-zone company recently added to the MOF pre-approved e-invoicing service provider list.

providers.name: Dariba Technologies LLC
providers.description: UAE tax-technology company recently added to the MOF pre-approved e-invoicing service provider list.
